task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Open bcWebCam's settings or options dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings, options, or preferences dialog box specific to bcWebCam is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Locate and enable the sound/beep notification setting
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, toggle, or option related to 'sound', 'beep', or 'audio notification' is visible within the settings dialog and is checked or enabled.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the settings dialog to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool or 'Save As' dialog is visible, saving an image file named 'beep_enabled_proof.png' to the directory 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\', or a File Explorer window shows the file successfully created in that exact path.

task_completion.description: Apply or confirm the settings change
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cursor clicking an 'OK', 'Apply', or 'Save' button in the settings dialog, or the dialog closing after the setting was enabled.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual bcWebCam GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks through the bcWebCam application menus and dialogs to change the setting, rather than using terminal commands or editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the settings dialog
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a screenshot tool (like Snipping Tool or Print Screen) to capture the actual settings dialog, rather than downloading an image or renaming a non-image file to .png.

integrity.description: The settings modified belong to bcWebCam
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings dialog clearly displays the bcWebCam name, logo, or context, ensuring the agent didn't open the settings of a different application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected proof path is exactly 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\beep_enabled_proof.png'.
